name: Staked InfiniFi USD
redeem: siUSD is a staked receipt token for InfiniFi's iUSD. On Katana, this contract is a LayerZero OFT representation, so the practical exit path appears to be bridging back to InfiniFi's main deployment, unstaking to iUSD, then redeeming. InfiniFi redemptions are liquidity-dependent: they can be immediate when liquid assets are available, otherwise the request is queued.
notes: More complex than a plain stablecoin: ERC-4626 staking wrapper over iUSD, plus cross-chain OFT transport on Katana. Reviewers should be comfortable with bridge, staking-vault, and redemption-queue risk.
